# TICKET.md — MAINT-12

## Summary

Triage and reduce alert noise in the on-call rotation.

## Description

The on-call team is receiving too many low-signal alerts. This ticket covers a
first-pass triage of all active alerts, silencing duplicates, and proposing
threshold adjustments to reduce page fatigue.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All active alert rules reviewed and categorized (keep / tune / silence)
- [ ] Duplicate alerts consolidated into single rules
- [ ] Proposed threshold changes documented with rationale
- [ ] On-call handbook updated with runbook links
